title: Jujutsu Minecraft
description: Unleash your inner sorcerer with this mod! Choose your clan, master unique abilities, and engage in strategic battles to dominate a supernatural world. Not finished yet
body:
Step into a world of sorcery and strategy with this mod! Choose from unique clans, each offering special abilities and traits that shape your gameplay. Master the art of Reverse Healing Techniques and unlock powerful abilities tied to your lineage. Engage in strategic battles, develop your skills, and rise through the ranks in a mystical realm where every choice matters. Perfect for players seeking a dynamic and immersive experience, this mod transforms Minecraft into a supernatural battleground filled with challenges and rewards.


**_This Mod is NOT FINISHED YET, EVERYTHING COULD CHANGE_**




**How to Play: Jujutsu Minecraft Mod:**
- Pick Your Technique
- Start by choosing your jujutsu technique to prepare for the journey ahead.

**Level Up:**

- Progress through the grades by leveling up.
- Press G to level up when you've earned enough XP.
- Earn XP by dealing damage to cursed entities or vanilla mobs

**Check Your Progress:**

- Press Shift+E to see your current grade and stats.
  
**Reach Grade 2**

- Once you've reached Grade 2, obtain Sleeping Pills to enter the dream world.
  
**Survive the Dream World**

- In the dream world, defeat Dream Mobs to collect the necessary parts to wake up.
- Craft the Parts Together

- After gathering all the parts, craft them into an item to wake yourself up.
- Unlock Your Full Potential

- Once you awaken, your jujutsu technique will fully manifest!





Controls:

- Z - Use Power
- V - Switch Power
- B - Reload Cursed Energy
- X - Sense Cursed Energy
- G - Level Up
